title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer - Database Services
score_reasoning: This role aligns strongly with your backend and database infrastructure expertise. You have proven Go/Python skills, PostgreSQL/MySQL production experience, and microservices architecture knowledge—all core requirements. The UK location with explicit remote setup fits your European preference and maintains reasonable timezone overlap (±1h from Berlin). Your observability background (OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana) directly matches their monitoring requirements. Growth potential is solid—deepening database infrastructure ownership at scale is adjacent to your senior backend trajectory.

red_flags: Primary requirement is 2+ years Go (you have it, but less deep than Python)
Cassandra NoSQL experience preferred but not core (your gap area)
SaltStack/Puppet configuration management light in your profile
